specific_mechanism: Drosophila circadian rhythms emerge from TIMELESS/PERIOD protein negative-feedback loop; light-dependent TIM degradation entrains the clock to photoperiod
llm_application: LLM context-window 'clock': maintain a TIM/PER analog accumulator that decays on user-prompt arrival (light analog), entraining the model's persona-state to user interaction rhythm.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes chronobiology feedback-attenuation mapping as proposed.
